title: Why the world's top-performing stock market in 2025 is seeing historic volatility
summary_full: South Korea's stock market has swung wildly in recent days, underscoring how the world's best-performing equities market last year can also be among its most volatile.
summary_public: South Korea's stock market has swung wildly in recent days, underscoring how the world's best-performing equities market last year can also be among its most volatile.
